templates.template: {PLAYER} must ask 'Cupid' (the host) for permission before speaking to anyone.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks without permission, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use their hands to drink; someone must bring the glass to their mouth.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} touches their glass, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must blow a kiss to the air after every drink.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to blow kisses.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say the word 'No'. They can only say 'Yes' or 'Maybe'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says 'No', drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must wink flirtatiously at someone every time they are assigned to distribute drinks.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't do it, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot be more than an arm's length away from their 'partner' (chosen now).
templates.punishment: If they move away, {PLAYER} drinks {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must refer to others as 'Your Highness of Love'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the title, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot look at their phone or reply to messages.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} looks at their phone, drink {DRINKS} punishment sips for ignoring those present.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must make a heart with their hands every time someone drinks.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can let go of their hands now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say anything 'negative' or anything that sounds like a complaint.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} complains, drink {DRINKS} sips to sweeten up.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must blush (or fake it) before answering any question.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't blush, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot touch their glass if they are not smiling.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks while being serious, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say 'How romantic!' after any player distributes drinks.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use words that rhyme with each other.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} rhymes accidentally, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must give a hug (if comfortable/safe) to someone every 3 turns.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the hug, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink with their eyes open.
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can look at their drink now.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} opens their eyes, drink {DRINKS} extra sips for peeking.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must sing a line from a love song every time they are asked something.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't sing, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use their thumb for anything.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses their thumb, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say 'I love you so much, (someone's name)' before drinking.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the love, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot mention the word 'Love'.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says the forbidden word, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must lean on someone's shoulder when another person is speaking.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} separates, drink {DRINKS} sip.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot sit down; they must stand or kneel until love gives them permission.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} sits, drink {DRINKS} sips for being lazy.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must imitate a character from a famous romantic movie.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} gets out of character, drink {DRINKS} sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink unless they toast with someone first.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the toast, drink {DRINKS} extra sips.

templates.template: {PLAYER} must give a long, deep sigh after every drink.
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the sigh, drink {DRINKS} extra sip.
